belier.intro: The Moon continues through Taurus, now at 19 degrees, still in your second house as the Last Quarter phase settles further toward release at 46 percent illumination. Yesterday's practical financial focus deepens today into a quieter reflection on what truly sustains you. The Leo Sun in your fifth house keeps a warm creative undertone present even as your attention leans toward material matters.
belier.love: A partner's generosity, whether of time or resources, deserves genuine acknowledgment today rather than being taken for granted.
belier.work: Continue consolidating financial or resource decisions rather than opening new fronts. The waning Moon favors thoroughness over speed now.
belier.energy: Your fire settles further into patience today, well suited to detailed, unglamorous follow-through.
belier.intuition: A financial instinct from yesterday deserves one more day of consideration before you act decisively.
belier.mantra: I build lasting value through patience, not haste.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon remains in your own sign today at 19 degrees Taurus, and the Last Quarter phase continues its steady work of release rather than acquisition. Yesterday's clarity about your own needs deepens today into quieter self-acceptance. The Leo Sun in your fourth house keeps home and emotional foundations gently present.
taureau.love: What you named clearly yesterday can now be lived rather than repeated. Let your actions carry the message.
taureau.work: Continue trusting your own direction over group consensus today, but allow room for the input that genuinely helps.
taureau.energy: Your steadiness remains an asset today, though it may feel quieter and more internal than yesterday.
taureau.intuition: Self-knowledge gained yesterday settles into something more permanent today. Trust the ground you have found.
taureau.mantra: I stand steady in what I have already learned about myself.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your twelfth house today, and the Last Quarter phase deepens the pull toward rest and quiet processing. Yesterday's private conversation or realization has had time to settle, and the Leo Sun in your third house keeps your mind gently active even in retreat.
gemeaux.love: A private understanding reached recently deserves protection from outside noise today. Not everything needs to be announced.
gemeaux.work: Continue closing loose ends quietly. The waning Moon still favors completion over new initiatives.
gemeaux.energy: Rest remains the wiser choice today. Trust that withdrawal is productive, not lazy.
gemeaux.intuition: A symbol or dream image from recent nights may clarify further today if you sit with it rather than analyze it.
gemeaux.mantra: I protect my quiet insights until they are ready.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your eleventh house today, keeping loyal friendships and long-term plans in steady focus as the Last Quarter phase asks for honest evaluation. The Leo Sun in your own second house keeps self-worth close to the surface, and yesterday's assessment of who truly supports you continues to clarify.
cancer.love: A steady friend's true value becomes even clearer today. Consider what it would mean to let the connection deepen.
cancer.work: Yesterday's honest assessment of a group effort can now guide a concrete decision about your continued involvement.
cancer.energy: Your energy remains steady and oriented toward the long term today, well suited to patient planning.
cancer.intuition: Trust continues to clarify around which alliances are reciprocal. Act on what you have already sensed.
cancer.mantra: I honor the bonds that have proven themselves.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your tenth house today, keeping career matters serious and decisive as the Last Quarter phase moves toward resolution. The Sun in your own sign keeps your confidence steady, and yesterday's professional turning point begins to show its practical shape today.
lion.love: A partner's patience with your ambitious focus deserves recognition today. A small gesture of appreciation goes far.
lion.work: A decision reached yesterday can now be implemented with steady, disciplined follow-through.
lion.energy: Your warmth remains constant, channeled today into consistent effort rather than dramatic gestures.
lion.intuition: The quiet certainty about your path that emerged yesterday deserves continued trust today.
lion.mantra: I follow through on the direction I have already chosen.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your ninth house today, keeping questions of belief and long-range vision grounded and practical as the Last Quarter phase favors decision. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house maintains a layer of private reflection beneath the surface of your day.
vierge.love: A shared vision examined honestly yesterday can now be discussed with more warmth and less analysis.
vierge.work: A long-term plan reaches a clearer shape today. Choose the practical path you identified yesterday and commit to it.
vierge.energy: Grounded and practical, your energy today favors implementation over further exploration.
vierge.intuition: A belief tested yesterday has either held or fallen away. Trust whichever outcome has emerged.
vierge.mantra: I commit to what has proven true and let the rest go.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your eighth house today, keeping matters of trust and shared resources intense but increasingly workable as the Last Quarter phase moves toward release. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps supportive friendships present in the background of a demanding day.
balance.love: A decisive conversation from yesterday can now settle into a calmer, more grounded understanding.
balance.work: Follow through on the firm decision reached yesterday regarding a contract or shared resource.
balance.energy: Steady rather than dramatic, your energy today supports consolidating recent progress.
balance.intuition: Your read on someone's true intentions, sharpened yesterday, continues to prove reliable today.
balance.mantra: I stand by the clarity I have already found.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues to oppose your sign from the seventh house today, keeping a key partnership prominent as the Last Quarter phase moves further toward resolution. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps career visibility high, and yesterday's clarity about a relationship continues to settle.
scorpion.love: Whatever became clear yesterday about a relationship deserves honest follow-through today, not renewed hesitation.
scorpion.work: Directness continues to serve you well in professional partnerships today. Stay with the terms you have already stated.
scorpion.energy: Steady conversation, rather than confrontation, continues to restore balance today.
scorpion.intuition: Trust the signal you received yesterday about a partner's true position. It remains accurate today.
scorpion.mantra: I act on the clarity I have already earned.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your sixth house today, keeping practical routine and wellbeing in focus as the Last Quarter phase asks for continued discipline. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps a sense of meaning alive beneath the day's more mundane demands.
sagittaire.love: Consistency continues to matter more than grand gestures today. Keep showing up reliably.
sagittaire.work: Finish what you started yesterday. The waning Moon rewards follow-through over new beginnings.
sagittaire.energy: Grounded and steady, your energy remains well suited to routine and physical discipline today.
sagittaire.intuition: Your body's signal about a habit, noticed yesterday, deserves to be acted on today rather than postponed further.
sagittaire.mantra: I honor my body's wisdom with steady action.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your fifth house today, keeping creative energy steady and productive as the Last Quarter phase favors completion. The Leo Sun in your eighth house adds emotional depth to what might otherwise be a light-hearted creative day.
capricorne.love: A romantic gesture begun yesterday can be brought to a warm, grounded conclusion today.
capricorne.work: Complete the creative project you have been refining. The waning Moon supports a strong, satisfying finish.
capricorne.energy: Productive and steady, your energy favors seeing a creative effort through to the end today.
capricorne.intuition: The small creative impulse you trusted yesterday deserves to be finished, not abandoned, today.
capricorne.mantra: I bring my creative work to a satisfying close.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your fourth house today, keeping home matters grounded and resolving as the Last Quarter phase moves toward closure. Saturn retrograde continues its structuring work in your own sign, and the Leo Sun in your seventh house keeps a key relationship steady and present.
verseau.love: The grounded conversation from yesterday can now settle into a genuinely stable understanding at home.
verseau.work: The balance you found yesterday between home and professional demands continues to hold today.
verseau.energy: Domestic steadiness continues to restore you more than outward activity today.
verseau.intuition: The family pattern you noticed yesterday is worth naming honestly today, at least to yourself.
verseau.mantra: I choose stability that is honestly mine.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 19 degrees continues through your third house today, keeping communication steady and grounded as the Last Quarter phase favors clear conclusions. The Leo Sun in your sixth house keeps daily routines in focus, anchoring your usual sensitivity in practical matters.
poissons.love: The calm conversation from yesterday continues to serve the relationship well today. Keep the tone steady.
poissons.work: Finalize the correspondence or plan you clarified yesterday. Decisiveness continues to serve you.
poissons.energy: Mental steadiness continues today, well suited to finishing practical tasks.
poissons.intuition: The clear thought you trusted yesterday remains sound today. Act on it without further delay.
poissons.mantra: I act with the clarity I have already found.
poissons.author: Sibylle
